item.description:
# DingDone 1.0.0
The first public release of DingDone.
## What's new
- Voice notifications when Claude Code and Codex finish work, need an answer, or continue working. - Offline speech using macOS system voices, with language, voice, phrase, and per-project settings. - A menu-bar panel with recent events, quick sound controls, and navigation to the relevant project or session. - Agent Cockpit: a floating widget and a list of sessions that need attention. - A library of additional voices and secure DingDone Pro activation. - Signed Sparkle updates with manual checks, background downloads, and English release notes.
## Reliability and privacy
- Agent hooks call a separate CLI, so notifications continue to work when the DingDone window is closed. - Free mode with system voices works locally and does not require an account. - Full agent message contents are not written to the event log.
